package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "math/rand"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for rand_newsource_with_time_now_per_call: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `rand.NewSource(...)` seeded from wall clock on each call path.
type CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallModel
}

type CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallService struct {
    repo *CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCall(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCallDTO) error {
    focus := "rand_newsource_with_time_now"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    rng := rand.New(rand.NewSource(1))
    _ = rng.Intn(10)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative := map[string]int{"rand": 1, "newsource": 2, "time": 3, "now": 4, "per": 5, "call": 6}
    rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    rand_negative_0 := rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative["rand"] + len(input)
    _ = rand_negative_0
    newsource_negative_1 := rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative["newsource"] + len(input)
    _ = newsource_negative_1
    time_negative_2 := rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative["time"] + len(input)
    _ = time_negative_2
    now_negative_3 := rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative["now"] + len(input)
    _ = now_negative_3
    for per_negative_4Index, item := range items { rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_4Index }
    call_negative_5 := rand_newsource_time_now_per_negative["call"] + len(input)
    _ = call_negative_5
    return nil
}
